description:
You are a backend engineer at a fintech startup. The 'payroll_engine' project at ~/PycharmProjects/payroll_engine/ processes paychecks for a mid-sized company. An internal audit has flagged critical discrepancies:
- FINANCIAL DRIFT: Year-to-date summaries are off by cents due to floating-point errors.
- TAX OVER-PAYMENT: Tax withholding is being applied at the top bracket rate to the entire income instead of progressively.
- SOCIAL SECURITY CAP: Social Security tax deductions must stop once employees exceed the 2024 wage base limit ($168,600).
- OVERTIME UNDER-PAYMENT: Overtime must be calculated for hours exceeding 40 per work week, rather than per pay period (e.g.,
